items.name_cn:
Apricot·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A best-seller that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Parisian street Rue De Solferino, this bag features original patent Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag closures—simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

Authentic Grade
The "SERPENTI CABOCHON" series mini shoulder bag features a charming large-scale graphic pattern and bold metallic details, radiating the brilliance of the SERPENTI world with its exquisite, practical design and modern style.
This bag is equipped with an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap, serving as a handbag or clutch to achieve versatile styling suitable for day and night.
Small size, with one storage compartment, one internal zip pocket, and one internal open pocket. Engraved BVLGARI brand logo on the inner metal plate.
Model: 291088
Dimensions: 22.5×15×10 cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
❤️【Lady Dio.r My ABC】"Apricot Lambskin"
/5-Grid Lambskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching for quilting details, its elegant and classic design is timeless. Finished with matching enamel, lined with sheep suede, and featuring a chain shoulder strap with an internal zip pocket, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24×20×11 cm
